role: Commander of the Basij Resistance Force (d. 2026)
bio: Gholamreza Soleimani served as commander of the [Basij Resistance Force](/orgs/basij), the paramilitary volunteer militia subordinate to the [IRGC](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps). Under his command, Basij forces played a central role in the violent suppression of the [2025-2026 protests](/events/january-2026-massacres), using live ammunition and other lethal force against civilian demonstrators. He was killed on 17 March 2026 in an Israeli airstrike during the [assassination of Ali Larijani](/events/larijani-assassination-2026), along with other senior officials.
editorial_notes: Killed 17 March 2026 in Israeli airstrike. Confirmed by Iranian state media.
